meaning: n.机智,手法,老练,角觉vt.对(刺激)操作性应答vi.(以言语或声音)操作性应答
examples: Tact was never Mr. Moore's strength.
Since both are strong on tact not so strong on the aggressiveness and tend to crave affection.
Her tact and intuition never failed.
The amount of missing data is a vexing issue, but it is not unique to TACT.
After a couple of years, Ross grew bored with TACT and went into finance instead.
